=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier.ts(16,52): suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedClass' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
/.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier.ts(23,52): suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedError' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
/.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier.ts(30,56): suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedRequest' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)


==== /.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier.ts (3 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
    
    // Valid usage: identifier differs from tag (no redundancy)
    export class DifferentIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<DifferentIdentifier>("MyIdentifier")("MyTag", {
      prop: Schema.String
    }) {}
    
    // Valid usage: no identifier provided (short form)
    export class NoIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<NoIdentifier>()("NoIdentifier", {
      prop: Schema.String
    }) {}
    
    // Invalid usage: identifier equals tag (redundant)
    export class RedundantTaggedClass
      extends Schema.TaggedClass<RedundantTaggedClass>("RedundantTaggedClass")("RedundantTaggedClass", {
                                                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedClass' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
        prop: Schema.String
      })
    {}
    
    // Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedError (redundant)
    export class RedundantTaggedError
      extends Schema.TaggedError<RedundantTaggedError>("RedundantTaggedError")("RedundantTaggedError", {
                                                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedError' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
        message: Schema.String
      })
    {}
    
    // Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedRequest (redundant)
    export class RedundantTaggedRequest
      extends Schema.TaggedRequest<RedundantTaggedRequest>("RedundantTaggedRequest")("RedundantTaggedRequest", {
                                                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedRequest' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
        payload: {},
        success: Schema.Void,
        failure: Schema.Never
      })
    {}
